name: H-13 --read exits two when no continuation artifact exists for the supplied session-id
command: H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --read --session-id never-existed 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'no continuation' err.txt && echo missing 1>&2
